title: codereview pass 1: duplicate CONFIG_LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED and DEFAULT_SF after adding to main Kconfig
description: Kconfig now defines the symbols in lichen/Kconfig, link/Kconfig and routing/Kconfig. This will trigger Kconfig 'multiple definition' warnings. Should remove from sub-Kconfigs and add 'depends on LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED' or equivalent where needed. P1 finding. Tagged codereview.
